> [!CAUTION]
> PR 请提交到 `dev` 分支 (Please submit PR to `dev` branch)
> **提到其他分支将会直接关闭 PR (PRs to other branches will be closed automatically)**

> [!IMPORTANT]
> 每个 PR 必须关联一个已被标记 `accepted` 的 Issue，并在下方用 `Closes #编号` 引用，否则会被自动关闭。
> (Every PR must be linked to an issue marked `accepted`, referenced below with `Closes #<number>`, otherwise it will be closed automatically.)
>
> 如果还没有对应的 Issue，请先提交 Issue 并等待其被标记 `accepted` 再发起 PR。
> (If there is no matching issue yet, please open one first and wait for it to be marked `accepted` before submitting a PR.)

## 关联的 Issue (Linked Issue)

> 请填写已被 `accepted` 的 Issue 编号 (Reference the `accepted` issue number)

Closes #

## PR 解决的问题 (PR Summary)

> 简单描述一下这个 PR 要解决的问题
> (Please provide a brief description of what this PR resolves)

## 影响范围 (Impact Scope)

> 可选填写，说明一下改动的影响范围
> (Optional, explain the scope of impact of the changes)

## 截屏 (Screenshot)

| 改动前 (Before)                        | 改动后 (After)                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------- |
